scripts.bundle:ios: npx react-native bundle --platform ios --dev false --entry-file index.js --bundle-output ./ios/main.jsbundle
scripts.bundle:android: npx react-native bundle --platform android --dev false --entry-file index.js --bundle-output ./android/app/src/main/assets/index.android.bundle
scripts.build:standalone:ios: xcodebuild -workspace ios/RepTracker.xcworkspace -scheme RepTracker -configuration Release -destination generic/platform=iOS -archivePath ios/build/RepTracker.xcarchive archive && xcodebuild -exportArchive -archivePath ios/build/RepTracker.xcarchive -exportPath ios/build/export -exportOptionsPlist ios/RepTracker/ExportOptions.plist
